ddls:
CREATE TABLE "irrigation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record of irrigation data */,
  "datetime_utc" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data point in UTC */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the irrigation site */,
  "method_code" TEXT /* Code for the method used to collect data */,
  "data_value" REAL /* The value of the data collected */,
  "qualifier_code" INTEGER /* Code indicating the qualifier for the data value */,
  "quality_control_level_code" INTEGER /* Quality control level of the data */,
  "utc_offset" INTEGER /* UTC offset for the data point */,
  "data_value_raw" REAL /* Raw value of the data collected */,
  "local_datetime" TEXT /* Local datetime corresponding to the data point */,
  "irrigator_record_valve_setting" INTEGER /* Valve setting for the irrigation system at the time of recording */,
  "source_code" TEXT /* Source code of the data collection */,
  "censor_code" TEXT /* Censor code indicating the status of the data */,
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Code representing the type of variable measured */,
  "collection_interval_minutes" INTEGER /* Time interval between data collections in minutes */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sampling data */,
  "data_aggregation_method" TEXT /* Method used for data aggregation */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was calibrated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_variable_code FOREIGN KEY ("variable_code") REFERENCES variables ("variable_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_quality_control_level_code FOREIGN KEY ("quality_control_level_code") REFERENCES quality_control_levels ("quality_control_level_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_source_code FOREIGN KEY ("source_code") REFERENCES sources ("source_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_method_code FOREIGN KEY ("method_code") REFERENCES methods ("method_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_qualifier_code FOREIGN KEY ("qualifier_code") REFERENCES qualifiers ("qualifier_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_data_censor_code FOREIGN KEY ("censor_code") REFERENCES censors ("censor_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the irrigation site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries related to the site */,
  "irrigation_system_type" TEXT /* Type of irrigation system used */,
  "crop_type" TEXT /* Type of crop being irrigated */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "methods" (
  "method_code" TEXT /* Code for each data collection method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Type of equipment used for data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_code" TEXT /* Code representing the variable measured */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable (e.g., Gallons Per Minute) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "qualifiers" (
  "qualifier_code" INTEGER /* Code for the qualifier */,
  "qualifier_description" TEXT /* Description of the qualifier */,
  "qualifier_type" TEXT /* Type of qualifier (e.g., approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qualifier_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "quality_control_levels" (
  "quality_control_level_code" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the quality control level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the quality control level */,
  "quality_control_procedure" TEXT /* Procedure for quality control at this level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_control_level_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sources" (
  "source_code" TEXT /* Code identifying the source of the data */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "censors" (
  "censor_code" TEXT /* Code for the censor status */,
  "censor_description" TEXT /* Description of the censor status */,
  "censor_reason" TEXT /* Reason for censoring the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("censor_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agronomist, technician, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the irrigation data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access-purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of access (e.g., analysis, reporting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES irrigation_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation event */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site where the event occurred */,
  "event_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of the event (e.g., valve opened, system checked) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the event (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_events_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site related to the alert */,
  "alert_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., warning, critical) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message describing the alert */,
  "alert_trigger" TEXT /* Trigger for the alert (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_calibrations" (
  "calibration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calibration event */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site where the sensor is located */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor being calibrated */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the calibration */,
  "calibration_result" TEXT /* Result of the calibration (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calibration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_calibrations_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "irrigation_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each irrigation schedule */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site for which the schedule applies */,
  "schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the irrigation schedule */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the irrigation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the irrigation */,
  "irrigation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the irrigation in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_irrigation_schedules_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data point */,
  "site_code" TEXT /* Code of the site for which the weather data applies */,
  "weather_date" TEXT /* Date of the weather data */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the site */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the site */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_site_code FOREIGN KEY ("site_code") REFERENCES sites ("site_code")
)
